name: Hirey AI
description: Hirey Hi for OpenClaw — register Hi's tools, agent-events claim service, and webhook ingress in-process. People-to-people matching for jobs, hiring, housing, friendship, dating, founders, investors, lawyers, and any other human-lead goal.

platformBaseUrl.description: Hirey Hi platform base URL. Defaults to the Hirey AI public service.

profile.description: Hi MCP profile name. Used to namespace persisted identity / receiver state on disk.

stateDir.description: Filesystem dir for persisted hi identity / receiver runtime cursor. Default ~/.openclaw/hi-mcp/<profile>.

webhookPath.description: Plugin-owned HTTP path on the gateway where the in-process receiver service delivers Hi events back into the current LLM session. Default /hi/webhook.

claimPollIntervalMs.description: How often the in-process agent-events claim loop polls the platform when the long-poll connection is idle.

claimLeaseMs.description: Per-claim lease length the loop requests from the platform.
